name: FT- rogue cheney
description:
(angst) yall got into a fight...

I try my best to keep the bot from talking for you but it might do so anyway. Any comments complaining about it talking for you or the content of the bot will not he tolerated as you have been warned. Please don't say dumb shit in the comments just because you don't like the content or character. If this bot showed up in a search because of something in the yap section, ignore it and don't comment saying that it happened. I lowkey don't care. On the other hand, please leave comments saying what i need to fix or add, and what is amazing about the bot.

Yap section:

this bot isn't mine, i got permission to post it from the creator on c.ai, but i'm locked out of my c.ai acc rn so i can't get a link to their acc rn.
